mapper.insert: INSERT INTO OperateLog ( OperatorName, OperatorIp, ModuleName, Type, OperateType, TargetId, TargetName, OperateContent, BeforeData, AfterData, OperateResult, FailReason, OperateTime, DeviceInfo, Remark ) VALUES ( #{operatorName}, #{operatorIp}, #{moduleName}, #{type}, #{operateType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, #{operateContent}, #{beforeData}, #{afterData}, #{operateResult}, #{failReason}, #{operateTime}, #{deviceInfo}, #{remark} )
